mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_NO, MENU_NO, SELECTR, INSERTR, UPDATER, DELETER, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY FROM sy_role_relation WHERE ROLE_NO = #{roleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY ORDERNO

SELECT ROLE_NO, MENU_NO, SELECTR, INSERTR, UPDATER, DELETER, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY FROM sy_role_relation WHERE MENU_NO = #{menuNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY ORDERNO

SELECT ROLE_NO, MENU_NO, SELECTR, INSERTR, UPDATER, DELETER, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY FROM sy_role_relation WHERE ROLE_NO = #{roleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND MENU_NO = #{menuNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ROLE_NO, MENU_NO, SELECTR, INSERTR, UPDATER, DELETER, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY FROM sy_role_relation WHERE ROLE_NO = #{roleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY ORDERNO
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sy_role_relation WHERE ROLE_NO = #{roleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
